label: Industry Analysis
definition: Analysis of market structure and competitive dynamics within an industry

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Systematic comparison of competing products or vendors on key dimensions

label: Benchmarking
definition: Use of standardized performance tests to compare systems or platforms

label: Field Research
definition: Primary data collection through interviews, surveys, and site visits

label: Document Review
definition: Systematic analysis of existing documents and published materials

label: Statistical Analysis
definition: Application of statistical methods to survey or measurement data

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of organizational or vendor strategic approaches

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking assessment of technology or market viability

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Documented real-world result that can be compared to predictions

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's capabilities and readiness

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative result from a performance test or survey measurement

label: Framework Factor
definition: Key factor identified within an analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative data about market size or market share or adoption rates

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative judgment by a domain expert or analyst

label: High
definition: Strong evidence from multiple sources or direct measurement

label: Medium
definition: Reasonable evidence but with some uncertainty or limited sources

label: Low
definition: Weak evidence or highly uncertain assessment
